notes: In game everything works well, but workarounds needed with Uplay. Mainly install a newer version of Uplay with protontricks, solve the network problem (https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/issues/162 via linking correct system libraries) and the steam recognize problem by uplay (https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/issues/1735)
title: The Settlers 7: Paths to a Kingdom: Deluxe Gold Edition
